creator: drr.backup@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dima Panov from comment #2)
I have always installed the binary package of libreoffice and the previous versions used to use the system theme under KDE/plasma without any issue.
I vaguely remember that previous versions too used to be compiled with 'kf5' off and 'qt5' on, if I am not wrong; I have looked into this back then to figure out why libreoffice wouldn't use the KDE file dialogue and concluded that it was because of 'kf5' off.
